projectDescription: A Chrome extension that runs Google's Gemma 4 AI model entirely on-device via WebGPU, enabling a private browser AI assistant with no API keys or cloud connectivity required.
keyFeatures: Runs Gemma 4 entirely on-device via WebGPU — no API keys or cloud required
Agentic tool loop: read page content, take screenshots, click elements, type text, scroll, run JavaScript
Shadow DOM chat overlay injected on every page
Native thinking/reasoning mode with streaming responses
Model selection between Gemma 4 E2B (~500MB) and E4B (~1.5GB)
Per-site disable toggle with persistent settings via chrome.storage.local
Portable agent loop with zero Chrome dependencies (extractable as standalone library)
publicApiSurface: TOOL_DEFINITIONS: read_page_content, take_screenshot, click_element, type_text, scroll_page, run_javascript
